Description: Displays Code Files with Syntax Highlighting using Prism.js. Add-ons include Autolinker, Match Braces (toggleable, true by default), Line Numbers(toggleable, false by default) and Invisibles(toggleable, false by default).

Parameters.Name: Codes
Parameters.Description:
An IEnumerable of CodeFiles. Each CodeFile has an Id, title, language, and code. You can provide as many CodeFiles as you want though both this parameter and as CodeBlock child components.
Remarks: At least one CodeFile is required, otherwise an exception is thrown.

Parameters.Name: Theme
Parameters.Description:
The Prism Theme for Syntax Highlighting
Remarks: Defaults to Prism Default

Parameters.Name: LineNumbers
Parameters.Description:
Enable Line Numbers for Syntax Highlighting
Remarks: Defaults to false

Parameters.Name: Invisibles
Parameters.Description:
Show Invisibles for Syntax Highlighting such as CR, LF, Tab, and Space
Remarks: Defaults to false

Parameters.Name: MatchBraces
Parameters.Description:
Show Match Braces for Syntax Highlighting so when you highlight one brace it highlights the corresponding brace.
Remarks: Defaults to true

Parameters.Name: CopyOrigin
Parameters.Description:
The Copy Button Origin, nullable field indicating where the copy button should be placed. If null no button will be rendered.
Remarks: Defaults to

Parameters.Name: CopyIcon
Parameters.Description:
The Copy Button Icon
Remarks: Defaults to

Parameters.Name: CopyButtonClassname
Parameters.Description:
The Copy Button Classname to add to the copy button
Remarks: Defaults to null

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description: User class names, separated by space.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description: User styles, applied on top of the component's own classes and styles.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description: Use Tag to attach any user data object to the component for your convenience.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description: UserAttributes carries all attributes you add to the component that don't match any of its parameters. They will be splatted onto the underlying HTML tag.

Methods.Name: PositionCopyButton
Methods.Description: Causes an immediate repositioning of the Copy Button
